# Geotechnik — Kaiserslautern

> Geotechnical engineering services in Kaiserslautern, Deutschland.

## Contact
- Website: https://kaiserslautern.geotechnik.vip/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Kaiserslautern, Deutschland.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
